tasks.subject: Task 1: Parameterize useTimeGrid hook
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make useTimeGrid accept dynamic day boundaries instead of using hardcoded constants.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/pages/start-day/useTimeGrid.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] useTimeGrid(dayStartMinutes, dayEndMinutes) accepts two parameters
- [ ] All internal math uses the parameters instead of constants
- [ ] Default constants still exported for backward compatibility
- [ ] startResize uses the passed dayEndMinutes for clamping

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npm run lint` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/pages/start-day/useTimeGrid.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["useTimeGrid accepts dayStartMinutes and dayEndMinutes parameters", "All internal math uses parameters", "Default constants still exported", "startResize uses passed dayEndMinutes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Parameterize TimeBlockGrid component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make TimeBlockGrid accept dynamic day boundaries as props and compute hour marks dynamically.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/pages/start-day/TimeBlockGrid.jsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Accepts dayStartMinutes and dayEndMinutes props
- [ ] Hour marks computed from props
- [ ] Grid lines and sub-lines adapt to range

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npm run lint` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/pages/start-day/TimeBlockGrid.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Accepts dayStartMinutes and dayEndMinutes props", "Hour marks computed from props", "Grid lines adapt to range"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add hour-range dropdowns and wire up StartDayPage
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add hour-range state, dropdown UI, range-change validation, and thread dynamic boundaries through all DnD handlers.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/pages/StartDayPage.jsx`
- Modify: `frontend/src/api/schedule.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Two select dropdowns above grid defaulting to 8 AM / 5 PM
- [ ] Changing range updates all grid math
- [ ] Narrowing past existing blocks shows warning and is rejected
- [ ] savePlan sends startHour and endHour
- [ ] handleAddToCalendar uses dynamic boundaries

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npm run lint` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/pages/StartDayPage.jsx", "frontend/src/api/schedule.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Dropdowns default to 8 AM / 5 PM", "Range change updates grid math", "Narrowing past blocks shows warning", "savePlan sends hour range", "handleAddToCalendar uses dynamic boundaries"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Backend — accept dynamic hour range in savePlan
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make backend accept optional startHour/endHour in save-plan request and validate against provided range.

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/schedule/dto/SavePlanRequest.java`
- Modify: `backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/schedule/ScheduleService.java`
- Modify: `backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/schedule/ScheduleServiceTest.java`
- Modify: `backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/schedule/ScheduleServiceEventTest.java`
- Modify: `backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/schedule/ScheduleControllerIntegrationTest.java`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] SavePlanRequest has optional startHour and endHour fields
- [ ] Defaults to 8/17 when null
- [ ] Validation enforces blocks within provided range
- [ ] All existing tests updated and pass
- [ ] New tests cover custom range, out-of-range blocks, invalid range

**Verify:** `cd backend && mvn test -Dtest="ScheduleServiceTest,ScheduleServiceEventTest,ScheduleControllerIntegrationTest"` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/schedule/dto/SavePlanRequest.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/schedule/ScheduleService.java", "backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/schedule/ScheduleServiceTest.java", "backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/schedule/ScheduleServiceEventTest.java", "backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/schedule/ScheduleControllerIntegrationTest.java"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && mvn test -Dtest=ScheduleServiceTest,ScheduleServiceEventTest,ScheduleControllerIntegrationTest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SavePlanRequest has optional startHour and endHour", "Defaults to 8/17 when null", "Validates blocks within provided range", "All existing tests pass", "New tests for custom range"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: E2E tests for hour-range dropdowns
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add E2E tests verifying dropdown UI, range change behavior, and block-prevents-narrowing validation.

**Files:**
- Modify: `e2e/tests/start-day.spec.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Test: dropdowns default to 8 AM / 5 PM
- [ ] Test: changing range updates grid hour labels
- [ ] Test: narrowing range past existing block shows warning

**Verify:** `cd e2e && npx playwright test tests/start-day.spec.ts` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["e2e/tests/start-day.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd e2e && npx playwright test tests/start-day.spec.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Dropdowns default to 8 AM / 5 PM", "Changing range updates grid labels", "Narrowing past block shows warning"]}
```
